ItacPersonItem.Notes: Bottazzo features as a main character in book 4 of Stefano Guazzo`s Civil conversatione (1574) referred to as `Cavalier Bottazzo`. For his biography, see Piero Floriani, `BOTTAZZO, Giovanni Iacopo,` Dizionario Biografico degli Italiani 13 (1974). There are 6 letters by Bottazzo in Stefano Guazzo`s Lettere Volgari di Diversi Gentilhuomini del Monferrato (1566).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
